trust-minimized.notes: Translated to capture the minimized need for trust rather than a strictly quantitative reduction of 'trust' as an abstract emotion.

prose.example: Hali ya kutohitaji kuamini ni mojawapo ya nguzo kuu za teknolojia ya blockchain.

trustlessness.notes: Expresses 'trustlessness' as the state of not needing to rely on trust, which is the precise technical meaning in crypto.

prose.example: Mashine ya Kawaida ya Ethereum (EVM) ni mfumo kamilifu ki-Turing.
Programu nyingi za Web2 zimewekwa kati na kudhibitiwa na kampuni moja.

web2.notes: Web2 is commonly used as-is in tech contexts in Swahili, occasionally referred to as Wavuti2.

prose.example: Mtumiaji alipoteza fedha zake kutokana na shambulio la sandwichi kwenye DEX.

sandwich attack.notes: Sandwich is commonly adapted into Swahili as 'sandwichi'.

prose.example: Mchepuko wa Byzantium ulipunguza tuzo za uchimbaji kutoka ETH tano hadi tatu.
Mchepuko wa Constantinople ulitekelezwa mnamo Februari 2019 ili kuboresha mtandao.
Ukusanyaji wa mafungu unaruhusu miamala mingi kuchakatwa kwa pamoja ili kuokoa gharama za gesi.

batching.notes: Translates the technical efficiency of grouping transactions as processing or collecting in batches ('mafungu').

prose.example: Nafasi ya blob inaruhusu ada za chini za miamala kwa rollups.

blobspace.notes: Translates to 'space of blob', leveraging the class 9/10 noun 'nafasi'.

prose.example: Tabaka la DA linahakikisha data yote ya miamala inaweza kupatikana kwa urahisi.

da layer.notes: DA is kept as an acronym, combined with 'tabaka' (layer).

prose.example: Mkataba mahiri una njia ya kujitoa kwa dharura ili kulinda fedha za watumiaji.

escape hatch.notes: Avoids literal 'mlango wa dharura' (physical emergency door) in favor of 'emergency withdrawal path' which fits smart contract mechanics.

prose.example: Mtandao unatumia uthibitisho wa hitilafu ili kubaini miamala isiyo sahihi.

fault proof.notes: Parallels 'fraud proof' (uthibitisho wa ulaghai) using 'hitilafu' for fault/defect.

prose.example: Mtumiaji anaweza kufanya utoaji wa lazima ikiwa mkusanyiko hautendi haki.

forced withdrawal.notes: Uses 'lazima' (mandatory/compulsory) to denote a fundamental protocol right, rather than a hostile action.

prose.example: Mikusanyiko inachakata miamala nje ya mnyororo mkuu ili kuongeza kasi.

rollups.notes: Direct translation 'mikusanyiko' (collections/gatherings) accurately represents the rolling-up of transactions.

prose.example: Tabaka kuu linasimamia ukamilishaji wa miamala yote kutoka L2.

settlement.notes: Avoids 'malipo' (payment) to emphasize the finality and completion (ukamilishaji) of the transaction state.

prose.example: Watumiaji wanaweza kufanya miamala mingi kupitia chaneli za hali kabla ya kuituma kwenye mnyororo.

state channels.notes: Uses the common tech loanword 'chaneli' combined with 'hali' (state).

prose.example: Ethereum inapanga kuongeza uwezo wa upitishaji ili kushughulikia miamala zaidi kwa sekunde.

throughput.notes: Specifically targets the rate/volume passing through a system (TPS), moving beyond general 'performance'.

prose.example: Suluhisho la Validium linahifadhi data ya miamala nje ya mnyororo.

validium.notes: Maintained as a proper noun protocol specific name.

prose.example: Mkataba mahiri unapokea data za mwito ili kutekeleza shughuli.
Kila muamala wa uundaji mkataba unatumia kiasi kikubwa cha gesi.
Mkataba unatoa matukio ili kuruhusu programu za nje kusasisha taarifa.
Waendelezaji hutumia lugha ya asembli ya EVM kuandika mikataba inayotumia gesi kidogo zaidi.
Matumizi bora ya gesi ni muhimu ili kupunguza gharama za miamala kwenye mtandao.

gas optimization.notes: Translated emphasizing efficient/optimal usage to avoid literal 'making gas better'.

prose.example: Ruaza za proksi hutumika kutatua tatizo la kodi iliyosambazwa isiyobadilika kwenye Ethereum.
Anwani hii inatumika kwa ajili ya prikampaili inayofanya ukokotoaji wa kielektroniki haraka.

precompile.notes: Using borrowed terminology adapted for Swahili to distinctly separate from general pre-compiled code.

prose.example: Lazima uongeze kizuizi cha uingiaji wa kurudia ili kulinda kazi hii dhidi ya wizi wa fedha.
Utendakazi wa kujifuta huondoa mkataba kutoka kwenye mtandao mkuu na kurudisha salio lililobaki.

self-destruct.notes: Translated to mean 'self-delete' per modern Ethereum terminology.

prose.example: Usanifu huu unatumia ruaza ya singeltoni kuhakikisha kuwa kuna mkataba mmoja tu wa aina hii unaofanya kazi.

singleton.notes: Software engineering term adapted phonetically as standard practice for software patterns in tech Swahili.

prose.example: Mkataba huu unatumia assembly ya ndani ya Solidity ili kupunguza matumizi ya gesi.
Mkataba mahiri huhifadhi hali yake kwenye mtandao wa Ethereum.

state.notes: Used in the context of state machines and blockchain state.

prose.example: Mtumiaji anaweza kudai tokeni zake ambazo zimefikia muda wa kutolewa.

claim.notes: Swahili distinguishes the noun 'dai' (claim/right) and the verb 'kudai' (to claim).

prose.example: Tokeni zako hazitaweza kutolewa mpaka kikomo cha zuio kipite.

cliff.notes: Avoided literal geographical cliff ('jabali'/'genge'). Used 'kikomo cha zuio' (lock-up limit) to accurately convey the time-based threshold.

prose.example: Ugawaji kuwa sehemu huruhusu wawekezaji wengi kumiliki asilimia fulani ya NFT moja.

fractionalization.notes: Translated to convey the concept of creating tradable fractions out of a whole asset, rather than merely breaking it.

compounds.lp_token_staking: uwekaji hisa wa tokeni za LP

prose.example: Utapokea tokeni za LP baada ya kuweka ukwasi wako kwenye bwawa.
Tunamia kiwanda cha tokeni ili kuzalisha mikataba mipya kiotomatiki.
URI ya tokeni inaelekeza kwenye picha na metadata iliyohifadhiwa nje ya mtandao.
Ratiba ya umilikishaji wa kimuda itahakikisha kuwa wawekezaji hawatoshi tokeni zote kwa mara moja.

vesting.notes: Avoided literal roots for 'clothing' or 'investment'. Translated to convey the progressive granting of ownership rights over time.

prose.example: Tokeni iliyofungashwa inakuruhusu kutumia thamani ya Bitcoin kwenye mtandao wa Ethereum.
Mkataba mahiri ulianzisha muamala wa ndani.

internal transaction.notes: Muamala follows the m-/mi- noun class (Class 3/4).

prose.term: ada ya kiwango cha juu kwa gesi
prose.example: Kuweka ada ya kiwango cha juu kwa gesi huhakikisha muamala wako utashughulikiwa haraka.

plurals.one: ada ya kiwango cha juu kwa gesi
plurals.other: ada za kiwango cha juu kwa gesi

max fee per gas.notes: Ada follows the n-/n- noun class (Class 9/10).
